zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrix Pierrepont於1162年出生時，她的父親Hugh de Pierrepont33歲，母親Clemence Rethel-52歲。她於1177年與William de Warenne Lord of Wormegay在英國諾福爾可喬加結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1203年之前在英國諾福爾可堂納姆 韋斯特，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可金斯 琳。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Beatrix Pierrepont于1162年出生时，她的父亲Hugh de Pierrepont33岁，母亲Clemence Rethel-52岁。她于1177年与William de Warenne Lord of Wormegay在英国諾福爾可喬加结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1203年之前在英国諾福爾可堂納姆 韋斯特，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可金斯 琳。

nameMeanings.name: Pierrepont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Beatrix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name, which was borne by a saint martyred in Rome, together with Saints Faustinus and Simplicius, in the early 4th century. The original form of the name was probably Viatrix, a feminine version of Viator ‘voyager (through life)’, which was a favourite name among early Christians. This was then altered by association with Latin Beatus ‘blessed’ (Via- and Bea- sometimes being pronounced the same in Late Latin). See also Beatrice .

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrix Pierrepont was born in 1162, her father, Hugh de Pierrepont, was 33 and her mother, Clemence Rethel, was -52. She married William de Warenne Lord of Wormegay in 1177, in Wormegay, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died before 1203, in Downham West, Norfolk, England, and was buried in Kings Lynn, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Beatrix Pierrepont est née en 1162, son père, Hugh de Pierrepont, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Clemence Rethel, avait -52 ans. Elle a épousé William de Warenne Lord of Wormegay en 1177, à Wormegay, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée avant 1203, à Downham West, Norfolk, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Kings Lynn, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.St. Botolph's Churchyard, Wormegay, King: Kings Lynn, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Beatrix Pierrepont 1162 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh de Pierrepont 33 und ihre Mutter Clemence Rethel -52. Sie hat 1177 in Wormegay, Norfolk, England William de Warenne Lord of Wormegay geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb vor 1203 in Downham West, Norfolk, England und wurde in Kings Lynn, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrix Pierrepont è nata il nel 1162, sua padre, Hugh de Pierrepont, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Clemence Rethel, aveva -52 anni. Lei sposato William de Warenne Lord of Wormegay nel 1177, nel Wormegay, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì prima del 1203, nel Downham West, Norfolk, England, e fu sepolta a Kings Lynn, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Beatrix Pierrepontが1162年に生まれた時，父Hugh de Pierrepontは33歳，母Clemence Rethelは-52歳であった。1177年にイギリスノーフォルクウオルメガイでWilliam de Warenne Lord of Wormegayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1203年以前にイギリスノーフォルクダウンハム ウエストで死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクキングズ リンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Beatrix Pierrepont(이)가 1162년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh de Pierrepont(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Clemence Rethel(은)는 -52세였다. 그녀는 1177년 영국 노르폴크 워메가이에서 William de Warenne Lord of Wormegay(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1203년 이전 영국 노르폴크 다운함 웨스트에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 킨그스 린에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrix Pierrepont nasceu em 1162, seu pai, Hugh de Pierrepont, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Clemence Rethel, tinha -52 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Warenne Lord of Wormegay em 1177, em Wormegay, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 1203, em Downham West, Norfolk, Inglaterra, e foi sepultada em Kings Lynn, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.St. Botolph's Churchyard, Wormegay, King: Kings Lynn, Norfolk, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrix Pierrepont родилась в 1162 г., её отцу по имени Hugh de Pierrepont было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Clemence Rethel, -52. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Warenne Lord of Wormegay в 1177 г. в местности вормегеи, норфолк, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла перед 1203 г. в местности доунам вест, норфолк, Англия и была похоронена в местности кингс линн, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.
